calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-16-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Wednesday, September 16, 2015, in Department 525:
Betty Chan, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona.
Linlin Wills, Appellant/Defendant appears as Propria Persona.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.
Plaintiff/Respondent, Betty Chan testifies on her own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court.

Defendants/Appellants, Ms. Wills testifies on their own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. No new evidence is presented in the Court. Small Claims Exhibits are retained.

Judge Pro Tem Robert Stumpf Jr.; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.
